evals.name: mermaid-available-A01
evals.prompt: Previous doview-outcomes-answer response cited Tool A1 (The Five Steps in DoView Planning) — https://doviewplanning.org/a1doviewtool — and Tool B16 (Do Not Silo Steps Under Outcomes Explainer) — https://doviewplanning.org/b16doviewtool. The Image-retrieval seed list at the end of that response included https://doviewplanning.org/book, https://doviewplanning.org/a1doviewtool, and https://doviewplanning.org/b16doviewtool. Now retrieve the relevant diagrams.
evals.expected_output: An image-retrieval response that begins with the IMAGE DISPLAY LIMITATION WARNING, then for each tool: cites the tool's page URL raw-visible, retrieves the Mermaid block from the corresponding chapter tool.md (A01 and B16) verbatim, includes the image-file URL fallback, ends with the full handbook reference.

assertions.text: Begins with the IMAGE DISPLAY LIMITATION WARNING starting 'This image-retrieval response attempts to display the most relevant original images...'
Contains the heading 'Relevant images from the DoView Planning and Outcomes Theory Handbook, Duignan, P. (2025),' followed by raw-visible https://doviewplanning.org/book
Contains at least one verbatim ```mermaid fenced block from the cited chapter tool.md (A01 — cyclic flow A→B→C→D→E→A)
Every tool URL appears as raw visible plain text starting with https://
No markdown link syntax for URLs (no '](http' substring outside the explicit image embed lines)
Ends with the full handbook reference + raw-visible https://doviewplanning.org/book

evals.name: png-fallback-C04
evals.prompt: Previous doview-outcomes-answer response cited Tool C4 (Large Real-World DoView Visual Alignment Example) — https://doviewplanning.org/c4doviewtool. The Image-retrieval seed list includes https://doviewplanning.org/book and https://doviewplanning.org/c4doviewtool. Retrieve the relevant diagram.
evals.expected_output: An image-retrieval response that recognises C04 doesn't translate cleanly to Mermaid (the chapter tool.md notes this) and falls back to the upstream PNG/image-file behaviour — image-file URL + markdown image embed line + raw-visible Page URL.

assertions.text: Begins with the IMAGE DISPLAY LIMITATION WARNING
Includes raw-visible Page URL https://doviewplanning.org/c4doviewtool
Does NOT invent a synthetic Mermaid block for C04 (which carries the 'does not translate cleanly to Mermaid' note)
Includes an image-file URL (or notes inability to obtain one) and the markdown image embed line if URL available
Ends with the full handbook reference

evals.name: subchapter-G02A
evals.prompt: Previous response cited Tool G2A (Evaluating Individual Components or Streams Within an Initiative or Program) — https://doviewplanning.org/g2adoviewtool. Retrieve the diagram.
evals.expected_output: A response that correctly maps the upstream URL g2adoviewtool to the chapter folder G02A (zero-padded subchapter) and retrieves the Mermaid block from g02atool.md.

assertions.text: Begins with the IMAGE DISPLAY LIMITATION WARNING
Correctly identifies the chapter as G02A (not G2A) when locating the doview-book copy
Includes raw-visible https://doviewplanning.org/g2adoviewtool
Includes a verbatim Mermaid block if g02atool.md has one
Ends with full handbook reference

evals.name: multiple-tools-prioritised
evals.prompt: Previous response cited five tools: A1, B7, B16, D5, G6. Image-retrieval seed list includes all five plus https://doviewplanning.org/book. Retrieve the relevant diagrams.
evals.expected_output: A response that applies the IMAGE PRIORITISATION RULE — does not blindly include every image; selects the most relevant based on the upstream prioritisation criteria (DoView Boards/diagrams over decorative; tools that directly illustrate the technical outcomes problem in the previous answer).

assertions.text: Begins with the IMAGE DISPLAY LIMITATION WARNING
Includes Mermaid blocks for the tools selected
If fewer than 5 tools are included, the remaining tool URLs are listed at the end of the response as raw-visible plain-text URLs (per the prioritisation rule)
No tool URL appears as a markdown link
Ends with full handbook reference
